task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server admin dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the LMS Setup creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or page for creating a new LMS Setup entry is visible within the SEB Server interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the Name, LMS Type, and Server URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name field contains 'State University Moodle', LMS Type is set to 'Moodle', and Server URL contains 'https://moodle.stateuniversity.edu'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Username/Client Name and Password/Client Secret.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Username/Client Name field contains 'seb-server-integration' and the Password/Client Secret field contains text (which may be masked as dots or asterisks).

task_completion.description: Save the configuration entry so it appears in the LMS Setup list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LMS Setup list is visible, showing the newly created entry named 'State University Moodle'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SEB Server web interface to configure the LMS setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the SEB Server interface, not terminal commands or database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the configuration details into a text editor to spoof completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration details are entered into the actual SEB Server web form fields.

integrity.description: The final LMS Setup list is genuinely from the SEB Server interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LMS Setup list is displayed within the SEB Server web application, with consistent styling and layout, not a mocked up page.
